field_evidence.critical_condition_basis: At a solvent composition of acetonitrile-water 46:54% by volume, the retention time does not change with molar mass, and at this "critical point of adsorption" separation is accomplished exclusively with respect to functionality regardless of the molar mass.
field_evidence.critical_component: critical point of adsorption of PEO
field_evidence.temperature_celsius: keeping the temperature for all experiments at 25°C

conditions.critical_condition_basis: liquid chromatography at the critical point of adsorption
conditions.detector: differential refractometer R401; u.v./vis filter photometer
conditions.notes: Critical condition established for PEO backbone; used to analyze C10-terminated PEO.
